summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Whalers on the Moon whale transaction tracker. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI and terminal theme implemented correctly, but found critical transaction duplication bug affecting data display accuracy.

ui_bugs.issue: Transaction duplication - Frontend shows 29 transactions while backend returns 14
ui_bugs.details: Backend API returns 14 transactions but frontend displays duplicates, showing 29 total. Only 16 unique transaction IDs found.

ui_bugs.issue: Stats count mismatch with actual displayed transactions
ui_bugs.details: Stats show Solana: 0, Base: 6 but transaction list shows different counts due to duplication bug

integration_issues.issue: Frontend not properly handling API response data, causing duplicates

passed_tests: Terminal theme implementation (black background, green text)
Email subscription form validation and submission
Network filter tabs (ALL, SOLANA, BASE) clickable
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical transaction duplication bug in frontend. The backend API correctly returns 14 transactions, but frontend displays duplicates (29 total). This affects data accuracy and user experience. Issue likely in React state management or transaction list rendering logic.
